M0500_RESPTX_AIRPR (M0500) Continuous Positive Airway Pressure Respiratory treatments utilized at home: continuous positive airway pressure. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0500_RESPTX_NONE (M0500) None of the Above Respiratory Treatments Respiratory treatments utilized at home: none of the above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x
